summary: Comprehensive testing of Safe-Route Navigation System MVP completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows tested successfully including Landing page, MapApp with route search, SOS, AI Chat, Incident Report, Contacts, and Admin dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints properly handle authentication and return appropriate status codes
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded from responses
Environment variables are used correctly for configuration
seed_data_creation: 12 incidents seeded in Bangalore area via /api/dev/seed-incidents endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend flows are working correctly. Test session 'test_session_demo_001' is pre-seeded in DB with admin privileges. Twilio SMS is in SIMULATION mode (simulated=true in responses). LLM integrations (GPT-5.2 for risk analysis, Gemini 3 Flash for chat) are working via Emergent LLM key.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: SIMULATION mode - logs instead of sending real SMS. Response contains simulated=true

backend: GET /api/ - Health check with twilio_ready and llm_ready status
GET /api/auth/me - Returns demo user with is_admin=true
GET /api/incidents - Returns 14+ incidents (12 seeded + test created)
POST /api/routes/safest - Returns scored routes with geometry, safety_score, level, nearby_incidents, lighting_score, crowd_density
POST /api/sos/trigger - Returns alert_id, contacts_notified, simulated=true, maps_url
POST /api/ai/risk-analysis - Returns non-empty analysis from GPT-5.2
POST /api/ai/chat - Returns reply from Gemini 3 Flash
GET /api/admin/incidents - Lists all incidents for admin
frontend: Landing page - get-started-btn and login-nav-button present, redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
MapApp - Map renders with incident markers, SOS button, AI chat trigger, route search sheet
Route Search - Origin/destination presets work, Find safest route returns scored routes with polyline on map
SOS Flow - Panel opens, shows contacts, confirm triggers SOS, success message with simulated=true
AI Chat - Panel opens, starter prompts work, messages send and receive replies from Gemini 3 Flash
Incident Report - Modal opens, category/severity selection works, submit creates incident
Contacts - Modal opens, add/list/delete contacts works
Admin Dashboard - Stats render, heatmap displays, incident table with filters, resolve/flag actions
